```{r}
setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path))
rm(list=ls())
library(ggplot2)
library(latex2exp)
library(mev)

source("reparametrisation_functions.R")
```

```{r}
safe_cor <- function(H) {
  
  # function to obtain the correlation matrix by inverting the Hessian matrix
  
  if (any(!is.finite(H))) {
    
    return(matrix(c(1, NaN, NaN, 1), 2, 2))
  }

  ev <- eigen(H, symmetric = TRUE, only.values = TRUE)$values

  if (any(ev <= 0) || min(ev) < 1e-8) {
    
    return(matrix(c(1, NaN, NaN, 1), 2, 2))
  }

  cov2cor(solve(H))
}

```

GPD

```{r}

set.seed(42)

d <- 1000

n_list <- c(50,100,200)

list_sig <- c(0.5,1)
list_xi <- c(-0.3,-0.1,0.1,0.3)

cross_corr_list_classic_gpd <- list()
cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- list()
cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- list()

correlation_list_classic_gpd <- list()
correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- list()
correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- list()

i <- 1

for (n in n_list){
  for (sig in list_sig){
    for (xi in list_xi){
      
  samples <- replicate(d,mev::rgp(n, loc = 0, scale = sig, shape = xi))
  samples_data <- as.data.frame(samples)

  init <- fit.gpd(unlist(samples_data),method = "obre")$estimate
  
  # classic parametrisation
  
  fit_classic_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = init, fn = GPD_nll, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_classic_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_classic_gpd[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_classic_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_classic_gpd[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_classic_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cc = unlist(cross_corr_classic_gpd))
  
  estimates_classic_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_classic_gpd[[i]]$par)
  estimates_classic_gpd <- do.call(cbind, estimates_classic_gpd)

  correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gpd <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_classic_gpd[1, 1:j],
      estimates_classic_gpd[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_classic_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gpd))
  
  # reparametrisation with unchanged xi
  
  fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
    optim(par = c(init[1]*(1+init[2]),init[2]), fn = GPD_nll_fixed_xi, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cc = unlist(cross_corr_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd))
    
  estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]]$par)
  estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- do.call(cbind, estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd)

  correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[1, 1:j],
      estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd))
  
  # reparametrisation with unchanged sigma
  
  fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = c(init[1],init[2]+log(init[1])/2), fn = GPD_nll_fixed_sig, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]][1,2]
    })

  cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cc = unlist(cross_corr_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd))

  estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]]$par)
  estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- do.call(cbind, estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd)
  
  correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[1, 1:j],
      estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd))
  
  i <- i+1
      }      
    }
  }

```

Violin plots

```{r}

N <- length(cross_corr_list_classic_gpd)

for (i in 1:N){

  n <- cross_corr_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$n
  
  sig <- cross_corr_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$sig
  
  xi <- cross_corr_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$xi
  
  cc_classic <- cross_corr_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$cc
  
  cc_fixed_xi <- cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]]$cc
  
  cc_fixed_sig <- cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]]$cc
  
  df_plot <- data.frame(
  value = c(cc_classic, cc_fixed_xi, cc_fixed_sig),
  group = factor(rep(c("classic", "fixed_xi", "fixed_sig"),
                     each = length(cc_classic)))
  )

  df_plot$group <- factor(df_plot$group,
                        levels = c("classic", "fixed_xi", "fixed_sig"))
  
  df_corr <- data.frame(
    group = factor(c("classic", "fixed_xi", "fixed_sig"),
                    levels = c("classic", "fixed_xi", "fixed_sig")),
    corr = c(as.numeric(correlation_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_classic_gpd[[i]]$cor)]),
           as.numeric(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gpd[[i]]$cor)]),
           as.numeric(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gpd[[i]]$cor)]))
)
  
  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.9, linewidth = 1, width = 1) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.05, outlier.shape = NA, fill ="white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = df_corr,
            aes(x = group, y = max(df_plot$value, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.15,
                label = sprintf("Corr. = %.3f", corr)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 6) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("classic" = TeX("$(\\sigma,\\xi)$"),
                              "fixed_xi" = TeX("$(\\nu,\\xi)$"),
                              "fixed_sig" = TeX("$(\\sigma,\\zeta)$"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("indianred3", "#4574eb", "#00A602")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = TeX(paste0(
    "n = ", n,
    ", \\sigma = ", sig,
    ", \\xi = ", xi, "$"
  )), y = "Cross-correlation") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )
}
```

GEV

```{r}

set.seed(42)

d <- 1000

n_list <- c(50,100,200)

list_sig <- c(0.5,1)
list_xi <- c(-0.3,-0.1,0.1,0.3)


cross_corr_list_classic_gev <- list()
cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- list()

correlation_list_classic_gev <- list()
correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- list()

i <- 1

for (n in n_list){
  for (sig in list_sig){
    for (xi in list_xi){
      
      mu <- sig/xi
      
      samples <- replicate(d,mev::rgev(n, loc = mu, scale = sig, shape = xi))
      samples_data <- as.data.frame(samples)
    
      fit_pwme <- EnvStats::egevd(unlist(samples_data),method = "pwme")
      
      init <- c(fit_pwme$parameters[2],-fit_pwme$parameters[3])
  
      # classic parametrisation
  
      fit_classic_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
          optim(par = init, fn = GEV_nll_known_mu, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
        })
  
  cov_fit_classic_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_classic_gev[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_classic_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_classic_gev[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_classic_gev[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cc = unlist(cross_corr_classic_gev))
  
  estimates_classic_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_classic_gev[[i]]$par)
  estimates_classic_gev <- do.call(cbind, estimates_classic_gev)

  correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gev <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_classic_gev[1, 1:j],
      estimates_classic_gev[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_classic_gev[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gev))
  
  # reparametrisation with unchanged xi
  
  fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = c(init[1]/(abs(init[2])*exp((1+digamma(1))*init[2])),init[2]), fn = GEV_nll_known_mu_fixed_xi, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cc = unlist(cross_corr_reparam_fixed_xi_gev))
    
  estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]]$par)
  estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- do.call(cbind, estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gev)

  correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_xi_gev <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[1, 1:j],
      estimates_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]] <- list(n = n, sig = sig, xi = xi, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_xi_gev))
  
  i <- i+1
      }      
    }
  }

```

Violin plots

```{r}

N <- length(cross_corr_list_classic_gev)

for (i in 1:N){
  
  n <- cross_corr_list_classic_gev[[i]]$n
  
  sig <- cross_corr_list_classic_gev[[i]]$sig
  
  xi <- cross_corr_list_classic_gev[[i]]$xi
  
  cc_classic <- cross_corr_list_classic_gev[[i]]$cc
  
  cc_fixed_xi <- cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]]$cc
  
  df_plot <- data.frame(
  value = c(cc_classic, cc_fixed_xi),
  group = factor(rep(c("classic", "fixed_xi"),
                     each = length(cc_classic)))
  )

  df_plot$group <- factor(df_plot$group,
                        levels = c("classic", "fixed_xi"))
  
  df_corr <- data.frame(
    group = factor(c("classic", "fixed_xi"),
                    levels = c("classic", "fixed_xi")),
    corr = c(as.numeric(correlation_list_classic_gev[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_classic_gev[[i]]$cor)]),
           as.numeric(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_xi_gev[[i]]$cor)]))
)
  
  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.9, linewidth = 1, width = 1) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.05, outlier.shape = NA, fill ="white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = df_corr,
             aes(x = group, y = max(df_plot$value, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.15,
                 label = sprintf("Corr. = %.3f", corr)),
             inherit.aes = FALSE,
             size = 6) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("classic" = TeX("$(\\sigma,\\xi)$"),
                              "fixed_xi" = TeX("$(\\nu,\\xi)$"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("indianred3", "#4574eb")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = TeX(paste0(
    "n = ", n,
    ", \\sigma = ", sig,
    ", \\xi = ", xi)), y = "Cross-correlation") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )
}
```

Gumbel

```{r}

set.seed(42)

d <- 1000

n_list <- c(50,100,200)

list_mu <- c(0.5,1)
list_sig <- c(0.5,1,2)

cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel <- list()
cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- list()
cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- list()

correlation_list_classic_gumbel <- list()
correlation_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- list()
correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- list()

i <- 1

for (n in n_list){
  for (mu in list_mu){
    for (sig in list_sig){
      
  samples <- replicate(d,mev::rgev(n, loc = mu, scale = sig, shape = 0))
  samples_data <- as.data.frame(samples)

  fit_pwme <- EnvStats::egevd(unlist(samples_data),method = "pwme")
  
  init <- c(fit_pwme$parameters[1],fit_pwme$parameters[2])
    
  # classic parametrisation
  
  fit_classic_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = init, fn = Gumbel_nll, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_classic_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_classic_gumbel[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_classic_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_classic_gumbel[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cc = unlist(cross_corr_classic_gumbel))
  
  estimates_classic_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_classic_gumbel[[i]]$par)
  estimates_classic_gumbel <- do.call(cbind, estimates_classic_gumbel)

  correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gumbel <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_classic_gumbel[1, 1:j],
      estimates_classic_gumbel[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_classic_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_classic_gumbel))
  
  # reparametrisation with unchanged sigma
  
    gamma<- -digamma(1)

  fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = c(init[1]-(1-gamma)*init[2],init[2]), fn = Gumbel_nll_fixed_sig, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]][1,2]
    })
  
  cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cc = unlist(cross_corr_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel))
    
  estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]]$par)
  estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- do.call(cbind, estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel)

  correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[1, 1:j],
      estimates_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel))
  
  # reparametrisation with unchanged mu
  
  K <- (1-gamma)/(pi^2/6+gamma^2-2*gamma+1)
  
  fit_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {
      optim(par = c(init[1],init[2]-K*init[1]), fn = Gumbel_nll_fixed_mu, x = samples_data[[i]],hessian=T)
    })
  
  cov_fit_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {safe_cor(fit_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]]$hessian)
    })
  
  cross_corr_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) {cov_fit_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]][1,2]
    })

  cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cc = unlist(cross_corr_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel))

  estimates_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- lapply(1:d, function(i) fit_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]]$par)
  estimates_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- do.call(cbind, estimates_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel)
  
  correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel <- sapply(2:d, function(j) {
  cor(estimates_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[1, 1:j],
      estimates_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[2, 1:j])
})
  
  correlation_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]] <- list(n = n, mu = mu, sig = sig, cor = unlist(correlation_at_each_replication_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel))
  
  i <- i+1
      }      
    }
  }

```

Violin plots

```{r}

N <- length(cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel)

for (i in 1:N){
  
  n <- cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$n
  
  sig <- cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$sig
  
  mu <- cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$mu
  
  cc_classic <- cross_corr_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$cc
  
  cc_fixed_mu <- cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]]$cc
  
  cc_fixed_sig <- cross_corr_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]]$cc
  
  df_plot <- data.frame(
  value = c(cc_classic, cc_fixed_mu, cc_fixed_sig),
  group = factor(rep(c("classic", "fixed_mu", "fixed_sig"),
                     each = length(cc_classic)))
  )

  df_plot$group <- factor(df_plot$group,
                        levels = c("classic", "fixed_mu", "fixed_sig"))
  
  df_corr <- data.frame(
    group = factor(c("classic", "fixed_mu", "fixed_sig"),
                    levels = c("classic", "fixed_mu", "fixed_sig")),
    corr = c(as.numeric(correlation_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_classic_gumbel[[i]]$cor)]),
           as.numeric(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_mu_gumbel[[i]]$cor)]),
           as.numeric(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]]$cor[length(correlation_list_reparam_fixed_sig_gumbel[[i]]$cor)]))
)
  
  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.9, linewidth = 1, width = 1) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.05, outlier.shape = NA, fill ="white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = df_corr,
            aes(x = group, y = max(df_plot$value, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.15,
                label = sprintf("Corr. = %.3f", corr)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 6) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("classic" = TeX("$(\\sigma,\\xi)$"),
                              "fixed_mu" = TeX("$(\\mu,\\rho)$"),
                              "fixed_sig" = TeX("$(\\nu,\\sigma)$"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("indianred3", "#4574eb", "#00A602")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = TeX(paste0(
    "n = ", n,
    ", \\mu = ", mu,
    ", \\sigma = ", sig
  )), y = "Cross-correlation") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )
}
```
